a.description: Minimum possible duration of the meeting (in minutes), the lower bound before which the meeting will not end.

b.description: Scheduled length of the management meeting (in minutes), marking the transition point in the CDF.

L.description: Maximum possible duration of the meeting (in minutes), the upper bound beyond which the meeting cannot last.

beta.description: Parameter β in the CDF, representing the cumulative probability at x = b.

X.description: Random variable representing the duration (lifetime) of the meeting, whose expected value E(X) is to be computed.
